module:
Decorators for semantic model handling.

This module provides decorators for Django models that enhance them
with semantic search capabilities and vector operations.

semantic_unit.docstring:
Decorator to mark a model as a semantic unit for retrieval with linguistic processing
    and vector operations.
    
    This decorator adds metadata and helper methods to models for semantic search
    capabilities. It marks which fields should be included in embeddings and
    which fields may require chunking due to length. It also enables linguistic
    processing for enhanced natural language understanding and vector operations
    for similarity search.
    
    Args:
        embedding_fields: List of fields to include in the embedding
        chunk_fields: List of fields that may need chunking
        linguistic_options: Model-level linguistic processing options
        field_linguistic_options: Field-specific linguistic processing options
        default_chunking_strategy: Default chunking strategy for all fields
                                   (string or ChunkingStrategyType)
        field_chunking_strategies: Field-specific chunking strategies
        vector_options: Model-level vector operation options (similarity_metric, backend_type, etc.)
        field_vector_options: Field-specific vector operation options
        **kwargs: Additional options
        
    Returns:
        A decorator function that enhances the model class
        
    Example:
        @semantic_unit(
            embedding_fields=['title', 'content'],
            chunk_fields=['content'],
            linguistic_options={
                'processor': LinguisticProcessorType.SPACY,
                'model_name': 'en_core_web_md',
                'chunking': 'paragraph',
            },
            field_linguistic_options={
                'content': {
                    'chunking': 'sentence',
                },
                'code': {
                    'chunking': 'token',
                    'processor': None,  # Disable linguistic processing for code
                }
            },
            default_chunking_strategy=ChunkingStrategyType.PARAGRAPH
        )
        class Document(models.Model):
            title = models.CharField(max_length=200)
            content = models.TextField()
            code = models.TextField()

get_embedding_text.docstring:
Combine the content of all embedding fields into a single text string.
            
            Returns:
                str: The combined text content for embedding generation

needs_chunking.docstring:
Check if a field needs chunking based on decorator configuration.
            
            Args:
                field_name: The name of the field to check
                
            Returns:
                bool: True if the field is in the chunk_fields list

get_chunking_context.docstring:
Create a chunking context for a specific field.
            
            Args:
                field_name: Field name to create context for
                
            Returns:
                ChunkingContext object

get_linguistic_processor.docstring:
Get the linguistic processor for a specific field or the model.
            
            Args:
                field_name: Optional field name to get the processor for
                
            Returns:
                A linguistic processor instance or None if not configured

get_chunking_strategy.docstring:
Get the chunking strategy for a specific field or the model.
            
            Args:
                field_name: Optional field name to get the strategy for
                
            Returns:
                A chunking strategy instance

get_vector_context.docstring:
Create a vector context for vector operations.
                
                This context contains parameters for vector search and other operations.
                It automatically includes relevant options from the model configuration.
                
                Args:
                    field_name: Optional field name to create context for
                    
                Returns:
                    VectorContext object configured for this model/field

vector_similarity_search.docstring:
Search for similar vectors using this model's data.
                
                Args:
                    query_text: Text to search for (alternative to query_vector)
                    query_vector: Vector to search for (alternative to query_text)
                    embedding_service: Optional service to generate embeddings from text
                    **kwargs: Additional search parameters (top_k, filter_expr, etc.)
                    
                Returns:
                    List of VectorSearchResult objects with similarity scores

get_vector_capabilities.docstring:
Get negotiated capabilities for vector operations on this model.
                
                Args:
                    **kwargs: Additional capability requirements
                    
                Returns:
                    Dictionary of negotiated capabilities
